# Bombay Breed - Strategic Sustainability Communications Advisory

> Expert advisory for climate strategy, carbon markets, and ESG governance for boards, CXOs, and investors navigating India's energy transition.

## About

Bombay Breed, led by Theresa Ronnie, provides strategic sustainability communications and climate advisory services. We help organizations navigate the complexities of climate policy, carbon markets, and ESG governance with practical, board-ready solutions.

## Website Structure

- Homepage: https://bombaybreed.lovable.app/
- Services Hub: https://bombaybreed.lovable.app/services
- Resources: https://bombaybreed.lovable.app/resources
- Credentials: https://bombaybreed.lovable.app/credentials

## Core Capabilities

### Energy Optimisation Consulting
/energy-optimisation-consulting
Strategic energy efficiency and cost optimization for industrial operations. We help heavy industries reduce energy costs while improving operational performance.

### Industrial Decarbonisation Strategy
/industrial-decarbonisation-strategy
Comprehensive decarbonisation roadmaps for heavy industries including steel, cement, oil & gas, and power sectors. Board-level strategy to net-zero pathways.

### Article 6 & Carbon Markets Advisory
/article-6-advisory
Expert guidance on Paris Agreement Article 6 mechanisms, ITMOs, carbon credits, and voluntary carbon markets. We help structure bankable projects and navigate bilateral agreements.

### Climate Investment Readiness
/climate-investment-readiness
Preparing organizations for climate finance, green bonds, and sustainability-linked financing. We help you become investment-ready for climate capital.

### DMRV Integrity & Due Diligence
/dmrv-integrity-due-diligence
Digital Monitoring, Reporting, and Verification services for carbon market integrity. Due diligence on carbon credits and climate claims.

## Industries Served

### Steel Industry
/steel-industry
Decarbonisation and energy optimisation for integrated steel plants and secondary steel producers. Focus on green steel transition, hydrogen-based steelmaking, and EAF optimization.

### Cement Industry
/cement-industry
Low-carbon cement strategies including alternative fuels, clinker substitution, and carbon capture readiness. CBAM compliance support.

### Oil & Gas
/oil-gas
Energy transition strategy for upstream, midstream, and downstream operations. Methane management, flaring reduction, and diversification pathways.

### Power & Utilities
/power-utilities
Grid decarbonisation, renewable integration, and demand-side management. Support for thermal power transition and clean energy procurement.

### Data Centres
/data-centres
Energy efficiency and sustainability for data centre operations. Green power procurement, PUE optimization, and carbon neutrality pathways.

## Geographic Coverage

### India (National)
/india
Comprehensive coverage of India's energy transition landscape including PAT Scheme, CCTS, BRSR, and renewable energy policies.

### Gujarat
/gujarat
India's industrial powerhouse with significant petrochemical, cement, and renewable energy operations.

### Maharashtra
/maharashtra
Manufacturing hub with major steel, cement, and power sector presence.

### UAE
/uae
GCC energy transition, Article 6 opportunities, and regional carbon market development.

### Singapore
/singapore
Southeast Asian climate finance hub, carbon services, and regional sustainability leadership.

## Regulatory Expertise

### Article 6 (Paris Agreement)
/article-6
International carbon market cooperation mechanisms. ITMOs, bilateral agreements, and corresponding adjustments.

### CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism)
/cbam
EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism impacting steel, cement, aluminum, fertilizers, hydrogen, and electricity exports to Europe.

### Corresponding Adjustments
/corresponding-adjustments
Double-counting prevention mechanism under Article 6.2 bilateral agreements.

### PAT Scheme (Perform Achieve Trade)
/pat-scheme
India's energy efficiency trading scheme for designated consumers in energy-intensive industries.

### CCTS (Carbon Credit Trading Scheme)
/ccts
India's domestic carbon market framework under development for compliance obligations.

## Problem-Focused Pages

These pages address specific challenges our clients face:

- /prepare-for-carbon-border-taxes - CBAM preparation for Indian exporters
- /reduce-energy-costs-heavy-industry - Energy cost optimization strategies
- /measure-scope-3-emissions - Value chain emissions measurement
- /net-zero-strategy-manufacturing - Manufacturing decarbonisation pathways
- /carbon-footprint-supply-chain - Supply chain carbon management
- /green-hydrogen-strategy - Hydrogen economy transition planning
- /science-based-targets - SBTi target setting and validation
- /sustainability-reporting-brsr - BRSR and ESG disclosure compliance
- /renewable-energy-procurement-india - Green power sourcing in India

## Combined Service Pages

Capability + Industry combinations:
- /decarbonisation-steel-industry
- /decarbonisation-cement-industry
- /decarbonisation-oil-gas
- /decarbonisation-power-sector
- /decarbonisation-data-centres

- /energy-optimisation-cement-industry
- /energy-optimisation-oil-gas
- /energy-efficiency-data-centres

Capability + Geography combinations:
- /decarbonisation-consulting-india

- /decarbonisation-consulting-singapore

## Key Resources

- The Climate Desk (Substack) - Weekly insights on climate strategy and policy
- Research publications and playbooks on carbon markets and energy transition
- Case studies and thought leadership content

## Contact

For strategic advisory inquiries:
- Website: https://bombaybreed.lovable.app
- Contact form on homepage

## Technical Information

This website is built with React, TypeScript, and Supabase. It features programmatic SEO pages for various capability, industry, geography, and regulation combinations to serve specific search intents.

Sitemap: https://bombaybreed.lovable.app/sitemap.xml
LLMs.txt: https://bombaybreed.lovable.app/llms.txt
